answers.field_label: Description Of Property On Which Advertisement Is To Be Displayed Including Full Details Of Its Proposed Position Within The Property
answers.value:
The proposed advertisement is to be displayed at 18 Ironstone Drive, Newman WA 6753, within the Newman Light Industrial Area in the Shire of East Pilbara. The property is a rectangular light-industrial lot of approximately 2,000 m² occupied by a small mechanical workshop trading as "Pilbara Desert Mechanical". The lot has a single vehicle crossover from Ironstone Drive on the eastern boundary and a sealed parking area in front of the main workshop building.

The sign is proposed to be installed inside the property boundary, approximately 2.5 metres behind the front boundary fence line along Ironstone Drive and roughly centred on the lot frontage. It will be located just to the left (north) of the main driveway entry so that it is clearly visible to vehicles travelling in both directions along Ironstone Drive, but set back sufficiently to avoid any interference with sight lines for vehicles entering or exiting the property.

The sign will sit within a small landscaped strip that currently contains low shrubs and decorative gravel. Two existing shrubs (each about 1 m high) will be trimmed but retained around the base of the new sign. The sign will be oriented perpendicular to Ironstone Drive so that both faces are visible from the road. There are no overhead powerlines within 5 m of the proposed location, and the sign will be clear of the existing stormwater drainage channel that runs along the inside of the front boundary. The nearest building (the workshop) is approximately 10 m behind the proposed sign location, so the sign will not be attached to or supported by any building structure.

The sign will not encroach on neighbouring properties or the road reserve. It will be fully contained within the lot boundaries, and its position has been chosen to complement the existing entry gate and to align visually with other commercial signage along Ironstone Drive while maintaining adequate separation from intersections and adjoining driveways.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.field_label: Type Of Structure On Which Advertisement Is To Be Erected Ie Freestanding Wall Mounted Other
answers.value: Freestanding double-sided pylon sign mounted on two steel posts set in concrete footings within the front landscaped area of the property.

answers.value: Primary background colours: deep red (similar to Colorbond Manor Red) and charcoal grey. Secondary background panel in white for business name. Text colours: white and light grey for the business name and contact details. Additional accent colour: bright orange for logo highlights and service icons. All colours have been selected to coordinate with the existing building façade and to provide high contrast for legibility without being visually intrusive at night.

answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.value: Sign face: 3 mm aluminium composite panels (ACP) with digitally printed UV-stable vinyl graphics and an anti-graffiti laminate. Structural frame: welded galvanised steel RHS frame concealed within the sign body. Support posts: two 150 x 150 mm hot-dip galvanised steel SHS posts, powder-coated in charcoal grey to match the building trim. Footings: reinforced concrete pad footings designed by a structural engineer to suit local wind conditions (Region D, cyclonic), with posts embedded and grouted. Fasteners: stainless steel fixings to prevent corrosion. Electrical components (for illumination): low-voltage LED modules housed within the sign cabinet, with all wiring run in conduit below ground to a dedicated isolator mounted inside the workshop building. All materials are selected for durability in Pilbara heat, dust, and cyclonic conditions, and to require minimal maintenance beyond periodic cleaning.

answers.field_label: State The Intensity Of The Light Source
answers.value: The sign will be internally illuminated using low-voltage LED strip modules with a total installed power of approximately 90 watts per sign face (180 watts total when both faces are illuminated). The LED modules are specified at approximately 1,200–1,500 lumens per metre, arranged to give an even, diffuse glow across the sign panels rather than any point-source hotspots. Illumination levels have been selected to ensure the sign is legible from the road without creating glare or light spill onto neighbouring properties. A dusk-to-dawn timer and manual override switch will be installed so that illumination can be reduced or switched off after trading hours if required by the Shire.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.field_label: Period Of Time For Which Advertisement Is Required
answers.value: Permanent approval is sought for the sign for the ongoing operation of the business, with an anticipated lifespan of at least 10–15 years subject to normal wear and maintenance. The sign is intended to remain in place for as long as Pilbara Desert Mechanical continues to trade at this location, or until a future redevelopment or change of use of the property necessitates its removal or replacement.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form

answers.field_label: Details Of Signs If Any To Be Removed In This Application Is Approved
answers.value:
There is currently one small, non-illuminated, single-sided metal panel sign fixed to the inside of the chain-mesh front boundary fence near the driveway. The existing sign measures approximately 1.2 m wide by 0.6 m high and simply reads "Pilbara Desert Mechanical" with a mobile phone number in black text on a white background. It is mounted at about 1.2 m above ground level using cable ties and light-gauge wire.

If this application is approved and the new pylon sign is installed, the existing fence-mounted sign will be completely removed, including all cable ties and fixings, and the fence will be left in a tidy condition with no protruding wires or sharp edges. No other advertising or directional signs are currently displayed on the property, so no further sign removals are proposed.
answers.reasoning: Pre-filled value from ground truth form
